scripts.typecheck: node node_modules/.bin/tsc --build --emitDeclarationOnly && node node_modules/.bin/tsc -p artifacts/api-server/tsconfig.json --noEmit && node node_modules/.bin/tsc -p artifacts/imagechat/tsconfig.json --noEmit
scripts.build: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm --filter @workspace/api-server run build
